description_long: This object is a polygonal, open-topped bucket or barrel with a wide, octagonal rim and a slightly tapered, faceted body. The upper section is a lighter tan color, while the lower section features two darker, horizontal bands that suggest structural reinforcement. The interior is hollow and appears to be spacious, suitable for holding liquids or solid materials. The exterior surface is smooth with sharp geometric edges, giving it a modern, stylized appearance. There are no visible handles, lids, or markings, and the object appears to be made primarily of plastic or a similar synthetic material.
description: A faceted, open-topped bucket or barrel with a wide tan rim and two darker horizontal bands, made of smooth plastic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide octagonal rim and two dark horizontal bands on the lower body.
description_view_1: Side view nearly identical to the front, highlighting the geometric shape and banding.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, still showing the open top and banded lower section.
description_view_3: Back view, visually similar to the front, with the same rim and band features.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: plastic reinforcement rings on lower body
